rationale: Fault batches are excluded from training and validation.
The first 90 batches are normal according to the statistics CSV; batches 91-100 are fault batches.
Normal batches are split in chronological batch order to avoid leaking later normal batches into early validation decisions.
Fault batches are held out for final anomaly and diagnosis evaluation only.
forbidden: No fault batch may be used for scaler fitting.
No fault batch may be used for loss-weight selection.
No test batch may be used when estimating preprocessing thresholds or phase-token boundaries.
